message:
fix(fcp-store): eliminate TOCTOU in lifecycle snapshot coverage vs reconstructable

snapshot_zone_lifecycle called get_distribution to build a CoverageEvaluation,
then separately called can_reconstruct[_with_policy] which internally called
get_distribution AGAIN. Between the two calls, the symbol store could change,
making coverage and reconstructable inconsistent for the same object.

Use the already-computed evaluation directly — same result without the second
write-lock acquisition and impossible to observe stale data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
